levelList.desc:

levelList.name: 爆碎斬
levelList.desc:
優先指定帯有[Prey]的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>
可无視<color=#7C5737>速度値</color>与本技能拼点
<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Combustion]与[Vibration]強度之和每有6級，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+3)
[DefeatDuel] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>失去10点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>

coindescs.desc: [UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加4級[Vibration]強度并対其施加4層[Vibration]
若本<color=#ffffff>硬幣效果</color>消耗了[BulletPropellant]，則使本硬幣造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+50%
[OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加3級[Combustion]強度并対其施加3層[Combustion]
[UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>[VibrationExplosion]2次，并使其[Vibration]層数減少2層

levelList.name: 快刀乱麻
levelList.desc:
優先指定帯有[Prey]的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>
可无視<color=#7C5737>速度値</color>与本技能拼点。直到使用本技能時，<color=#ffffff>自身</color>不会陷入混乱
[WhenUse] 消耗所有[BattleSense]，若消耗的[BattleSense]層数
- 不低于10層，則每消耗10層，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>攻撃容量</color>+1(最多+2)
- 為25層，則主要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Combustion]与[Vibration]強度之和每有4級，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+1(最多+5)
[DefeatDuel] 対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加4層[ResultReduction]
[DefeatDuel] 対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加1層[Paralysis]
[DefeatDuel] 使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-80%，且本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>不会使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>陷入混乱，令本技能増加的[Combustion]与[Vibration]強度与施加的[Combustion]与[Vibration]層数減半(不包括其他效果増加的施加量)
[EndSkill] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>[FullReload](<color=#7C5738>每回合</color>最多1次)
- 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>帯有[BulletPropellantSpecial]，則改為使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>[ReloadKeepAmmo](<color=#7C5738>每回合</color>最多1次)
[EndSkill] 結束<color=#7C5738>本回合</color>

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 根据消耗的[BulletPropellant]層数，使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加相應的[Combustion]与[Vibration]強度并対其施加相應層数的[Combustion]与[Vibration]
[UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>[VibrationExplosion]3次，并使其[Vibration]層数減少3層

levelList.name: 超絶猛虎殺撃乱斬
levelList.desc:
優先指定帯有[Prey]的<color=#ffffff>目標</color>
可无視<color=#7C5737>速度値</color>与本技能拼点。直到使用本技能時，<color=#ffffff>自身</color>不会陷入混乱

- 不低于10層，則每消耗10層，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>攻撃容量</color>+1(最多+4)
- 不低于25層，則主要<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Combustion]与[Vibration]強度之和每有4級，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>最終威力</color>+1(最多+6)
- 為50層，則使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1，造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+50%
[DefeatDuel] 対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加2層[ResultReduction]
[DefeatDuel] 対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加6層[Paralysis]
[DefeatDuel] 使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-80%，且本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>不会使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>陷入混乱，令本技能増加的[Combustion]与[Vibration]強度与施加的[Combustion]与[Vibration]層数減半(不包括其他效果増加的施加量)
[EndSkill] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>[FullReload](<color=#7C5738>每回合</color>最多1次)
- 若<color=#ffffff>自身</color>帯有[BulletPropellantSpecial]，則改為使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>[ReloadKeepAmmo](<color=#7C5738>每回合</color>最多1次)
[EndSkill] 結束<color=#7C5738>本回合</color>

coindescs.desc: [UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>[VibrationExplosion]5次，并使其[Vibration]層数減少5層

levelList.name: 没有仙人庇護的徒有虚名之家主，只会如虫豸般惨死！！！
levelList.desc:
[WhenUse] 若本体<color=#61DA61>体力</color>不高于30%，則使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+3，造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+30%
[WhenUse] 若本体<color=#61DA61>体力</color>低于50%，則使本技能的所有硬幣轉化為[SuperCoin]
[DefeatDuel] 使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-50%，且本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>不会使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>陷入混乱

coindescs.desc: [UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] 対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>施加1層積累的順从

levelList.name: 恭敬参拜
levelList.desc:
可无視<color=#7C5737>速度値</color>与本技能拼点，直到使用本技能時，<color=#ffffff>自身</color>不会陷入混乱
[WhenUse] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使躯干<color=#ffffff>部位</color>獲得2層[Enhancement]，2層[Endurance]与2層[AttackDmgUp]
[WhenUse] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復30点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>
[DefeatDuel] 使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-50%，且本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>不会使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>陷入混乱

levelList.name: 仙皇虫大人，請待在吾身辺
levelList.desc:
[StartBattle] 使本体与躯干<color=#ffffff>部位</color>獲得其<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限10%的<color=#81BBE8>護盾</color>
[WhenUse] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使躯干<color=#ffffff>部位</color>獲得1層[Enhancement]，1層[Endurance]与2層[AttackDmgUp]
[WhenUse] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復15点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加3級[Sinking]強度并対其施加2層[Sinking]

levelList.name: 仙人啊…！
levelList.desc:
可无視<color=#7C5737>速度値</color>与本技能拼点，直到使用本技能時，<color=#ffffff>自身</color>不会陷入混乱
[StartBattle] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>生成5顆長輩之樹
[DefeatDuel] 使本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>-50%，且本技能造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>不会使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>陷入混乱
[EndSkill] 結束<color=#7C5738>本回合</color>

levelList.name: 化作史弥胤之助力叭！
levelList.desc: 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>現存<color=#61DA61>体力</color>不低于50%，則使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 使未帯有[ImperfectEternalLife]的<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>中現存<color=#61DA61>体力</color>最低的1名<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>恢復其<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限15%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>
[OnSucceedAttack] 使未帯有[ImperfectEternalLife]的<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>中現存<color=#61DA61>体力</color>最低的1名<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>恢復其<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限15%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>

levelList.name: 極仙榨滴供養
levelList.desc:
[CantIdentify]
本技能不会対<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>造成<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>
可无視<color=#7C5737>速度値</color>与本技能拼点。直到使用本技能時，<color=#ffffff>自身</color>不会陷入混乱
[WhenUse] 每有1名<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>帯有[SupremeEternalLife]，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+2，造成的<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>+20%
[WhenUse] 若没有<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>帯有[SupremeEternalLife]，則使<color=#ffffff>全体</color><color=#ffffff>目標</color>獲得200点<color=#81BBE8>護盾</color>
[EndSkill] 結束<color=#7C5738>本回合</color>

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>為<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>，則吸收其剩余<color=#61DA61>体力</color>与其帯有的[ImperfectEternalLife]，<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>対<color=#ffffff>自身</color>施加吸收的[ImperfectEternalLife]層数。移除被吸收的<color=#ffffff>友方単位</color>
[UnBrokenCoinOnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>増加8級[Laceration]強度与8級[Burst]強度

levelList.name: 我会安分守己
levelList.desc:
[CanDuelGuard] 
[WinDuel] 使賈母恢復15点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>。若賈母的<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>低于0点，則改為恢復30点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>。

levelList.name: 奉上歓愉
levelList.desc:
[CantDuel]
[EndSkill] <color=#ffffff>自身</color>陣亡，使賈母的<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>恢復至45点，<color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使賈母獲得2層[Enhancement]与5層[AttackDmgUp]

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>目標</color>的<color=#ffffff>混乱閾値</color>前移本硬幣<color=#ffffff>傷害</color>量的50%

levelList.name: 予吾生命
levelList.desc: 若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>現存<color=#61DA61>体力</color>不低于50%，則使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1

coindescs.desc: [OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限20%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>
[OnSucceedAttack] 使<color=#ffffff>自身</color>恢復<color=#61DA61>体力</color>上限20%的<color=#61DA61>体力</color>

levelList.name: 賜吾歓愉
levelList.desc:
若<color=#ffffff>目標</color>現存<color=#61DA61>体力</color>不低于50%，則使本技能的<color=#ffffff>拼点威力</color>+2
[WhenUse] 使賈母恢復10点<color=#81BBE8>理智値</color>

levelList.name: 仙人的睿智勧誡
levelList.desc: [WhenUse] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使賈母獲得1層[Enhancement]与1層[AttackDmgUp]

levelList.name: 仙人的衷心勧誡
levelList.desc: [WhenUse] <color=#7C5738>下回合</color>使賈母獲得1層[Endurance]与1層[Protection]

levelList.name: 徒労无益的爭扎…！
levelList.desc:
[CanDuelGuard]
[WhenUse] <color=#ffffff>目標</color>的[Laceration]与[Burst]強度之和每有5級，使本技能的<color=#ffffff>硬幣威力</color>+1(最多+3)
[WinDuel] 対<color=#ffffff>目標</color>施加1層[Burst]与2層[DefenseDown]
